From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1974 Italy, Turkey film

| A forza di sberle | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Starring | [Don Backy](/wiki/Don_Backy "Don Backy") [George Eastman](/wiki/George_Eastman_(actor) "George Eastman (actor)") |
| Release date | * 1974 (1974) |
| Countries | Italy, Turkey |
| Language | Italian |

***A forza di sberle*** is a 1974 action comedy film directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The original Italian version is considered lost, however Turkish dubbed version has been preserved[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*].

## Critical response

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=A_forza_di_sberle&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Critical response")]

A review in the *[Corriere della Sera](/wiki/Corriere_della_Sera "Corriere della Sera")* praises the fact that the film does not take itself too seriously but regrets its lack of imagination.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## References

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=A_forza_di_sberle&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: References")]

1. **[^](#cite_ref-1)** ["A forza di sberle"](https://www.avclub.com/film/reviews/a-forza-di-sberle-1974). *[The A.V. Club](/wiki/The_A.V._Club "The A.V. Club")*.
2. **[^](#cite_ref-2)** Chiti, Roberto (1991). *Dizionario del cinema italiano* (in Italian). Gremesse. p. 19.
